title: the result of the account columns selected is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B ( ID Int32, VALUE1 Float64, VALUE2 Float64, VALUE3 Int32 DEFAULT 0 ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ID;
SELECT (VALUE1 + VALUE2) FROM B WHERE VALUE3 IS NULL;
SELECT (VALUE1 - VALUE2) AS RESULT FROM B WHERE VALUE1 > 0;
key_bug_features: Incorrect result from arithmetic operation on selected columns
